# Mission Critical Group

**Category:** Power Infrastructure, Generators and Microgrids, Switchgear and PDUs, Construction and Integration
**Website:** https://missioncriticalgroup.com/

## Headline
Electrical systems and modular power solutions provider spanning switchgear, enclosures, generators, and behind-the-meter applications.

## Overview
Mission Critical Group adds real weight to the modular electrical side of the market map. It is especially useful where buyers are thinking about power packages, generator enclosures, modular electrical gear, transfer systems, and resilient behind-the-meter infrastructure rather than only the white-space IT layer.

## Key capabilities
- modular electrical systems
- switchgear and generator enclosure solutions
- behind-the-meter and resilience support
- packaged power delivery for constrained deployment environments

## Best fit for
- buyers constrained by power availability
- teams comparing modular electrical packages
- mission-critical projects where power infrastructure is the bottleneck
